domain: Filipino kali/eskrima/arnis (Philippines, national sport): 12-angle attack drill (foundational alphabet abecedario A-Z); 3 ranges of combat largo (long-distance) + medio (mid) + corto (close); sinawali double-stick coordination develops rhythm + ambidexterity; paired-partner attack-defense flow; lineage variants reorder the 12-angle sequence around canonical core; progressive overload curriculum across ranges.
specific_mechanism: KALI-ESKRIMA-12-ANGLE-ABECEDARIO-3-RANGE-LARGO-MEDIO-CORTO-SINAWALI-DOUBLE-STICK-PAIRED-PROGRESSIVE-TRAINING-METHOD: LLM training-method mechanism with (1) 12-angle abecedario primitive alphabet A_12: 12 canonical attack-pattern primitives spanning input-target space; every training prompt mapped to one of 12; (2) 3-range progressive curriculum C_3: training progresses largo (long-context easy) → medio (mid-difficulty) → corto (close-quarters hard); each range gates the next; (3) sinawali double-stick paired coordination D_pair: model trained simultaneously on attack (positive) + defense (negative) example per query → ambidextrous offensive+defensive policy; (4) lineage-variant reordering R_lineage: 12-angle sequence permuted per lineage-domain; multiple data-orderings per epoch; (5) per-angle progressive-overload curriculum O_angle: difficulty within each angle ramps separately, then combined. Differs from R533 RADIF-7-DASTGAH-GUSHE (7+5 dastgāh + gushe-unit + maktab K-cohort + single-passage + bedāheh gate) and R546 COSSACK-5-SOTNIA-100-COHORT-RANK-PROMOTION (5×100 + 3-rank + 4-weapon + 5-stage dzhigitovka + 11% specialist) by 12-angle abecedario alphabet + 3-range largo/medio/corto curriculum + sinawali double-stick paired coordination + lineage-variant reordering + per-angle progressive-overload.
llm_application: KALI-ESKRIMA-12-ANGLE-ABECEDARIO-3-RANGE-LARGO-MEDIO-CORTO-SINAWALI-DOUBLE-STICK-PAIRED-PROGRESSIVE-TRAINING-METHOD LLM mechanism + 12-angle abecedario A_12 primitive alphabet attack-pattern + 3-range C_3 progressive curriculum largo-medio-corto gating + sinawali D_pair double-stick paired attack-defense ambidextrous + lineage-variant R_lineage 12-angle permutation + per-angle O_angle progressive overload. Differs from R533 RADIF (closest — 7+5 dastgāh + gushe + maktab + bedāheh). R546 COSSACK (closest — 5×100 + 3-rank + 4-weapon + 5-stage). Differs from Curriculum Instruction + Adaptive Curriculum RL + Adversarial Preference + LLM-TOC by 12-angle alphabet + 3-range curriculum + sinawali paired coordination + lineage reordering + per-angle overload. Differs by 12-ANGLE ABECEDARIO + 3-RANGE LARGO-MEDIO-CORTO + SINAWALI PAIRED + LINEAGE REORDERING + PER-ANGLE OVERLOAD.
novelty_claim: Curriculum Instruction Tuning + Adaptive Curriculum 2504.05520 + Adversarial Preference ACL 2025 + LLM-TOC MDPI cover difficulty-graded + adversarial-paired + progressive paradigm. KALI-ESKRIMA-12-ANGLE-ABECEDARIO-3-RANGE-LARGO-MEDIO-CORTO-SINAWALI adds (a) 12-angle alphabet + (b) 3-range curriculum + (c) sinawali paired + (d) lineage-variant reordering + (e) per-angle overload. Recombination — borderline lookup.
